title: Fix N+1 query in EventsHelper.getEventsSync
description:
Steps to reproduce:
1. 

Expected: 
Actual: 

EventsHelper.kt:557 calls eventsDB.getEventWithId() inside a loop over events. This is an N+1 query problem. Should batch into a single query. This method is on the widget hot path so the impact is amplified — every widget update triggers this.
